question_text: Which of the following would produce the largest moment when pushing a door open?

options.label: A
options.text: Pushing with 100 N force at 0.2 m from the hinge

options.label: B
options.text: Pushing with 150 N force at 0.3 m from the hinge

options.label: C
options.text: Pushing with 200 N force at 0.1 m from the hinge

options.label: D
options.text: Pushing with 50 N force at 0.5 m from the hinge

explanation: Calculate the moment for each option: A = 100 × 0.2 = 20 N m, B = 150 × 0.3 = 45 N m, C = 200 × 0.1 = 20 N m, D = 50 × 0.5 = 25 N m. Option B produces the largest moment of 45 N m, making it easiest to open the door.
